story.text:
# ✨ Etherchant
**🎵(chant) → ⚡(ether) → 💎(crystallise)**
*adamantia · etherchanting · V51*

Chant a programmable spell into the etherchain. The etherchant is the public form of the commitment.

> An etherchant is a song the chain remembers. Sing once; sing forever.

*Keywords:* etherchant · ether · spell · public · v51
